bulk.deleteDescription_one: This permanently removes the selected item.
bulk.deleteDescription_other: This permanently removes the {{count}} selected items.
bulk.moveDescription: Pick the destination area for the selected items.

delete.description: This permanently removes the item and any attached files.
delete.title: Delete {{name}}?

detail.errorDescription: Reload the page or try again in a moment.

filesTab.emptyDocuments: No documents yet. Manuals, warranties, certificates.
filesTab.emptyImages: No images yet. Add item images to use them on cards.
filesTab.emptyInvoices: No invoices yet. Add purchase receipts to surface them in reports.

detail.historyDescription: Every change to this item — who, when, and what changed.
detail.notFoundDescription: It may have been deleted or you don't have access to it.
detail.sheetDescriptionFallback: Inspect, edit, or manage files for the selected item.

description.disposed: Permanently remove this item from your inventory.
description.lost: Mark this item as lost. You can still revert later.
description.sold: Record the sale of this item, including the proceeds.
description.written_off: Write off this item — usually for insurance or accounting.

errors.noteTooLong: Note must be 1024 characters or fewer.
errors.salePriceRequired: Sale price is required when marking as sold.

terminalStatus.revertConfirmDescription: This puts the item back into active use. You can mark it as sold, lost, disposed, or written off again later.

warranty.description: Track when the manufacturer or seller cover ends.
warranty.emptyState: No warranty tracked yet. Edit the item to add an expiry date.
warranty.noneInline: No warranty information recorded for this item.
warranty.title: Warranty

fields.commentsPlaceholder: Maintenance tips, filter models, anything useful…
fields.convertedOriginalPriceHint: What you paid, expressed in the group currency.
fields.currentPriceHelp: Current resale / insurance value in group currency.
fields.draftHelp: Required fields are relaxed — finish later
fields.foreignCurrencyBanner: The group uses {{groupCurrency}}. Enter at least one of the fields below so the item value can be used in reports.
fields.name: Name
fields.partNumbersHelp: Manufacturer part numbers — useful when reordering replacements.
fields.revealExtraSerials: This item has multiple serial numbers
fields.serialNumberHelp: Found on device label or packaging
fields.shortNameHelp: 1–40 chars, used in compact lists and labels
fields.tagsHelp: Pick tags from the list, or type your own and press Enter or comma.
fields.tagsPlaceholder: Enter comma-separated tags, e.g. kitchen, electronics, gift…
fields.warrantyExpiresAtHelp: Leave empty if there's no warranty to track. The system emails reminders 60, 30, and 7 days before this date.

assignLocationBanner.title: Place this item in a location?

closeConfirm.description: You have unsaved changes. Save them as a draft to finish later, or discard them and start over next time.
closeConfirm.title: Save your progress?

form.fileUploadFailed: Couldn't upload {{name}}. You can attach it later from the item's detail page.
form.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

choose.subtitle: We found more than one product. Pick the one to add — you can add the others separately afterwards.
choose.title: Choose which item to add

ai.description: Photograph the item and its label, or add a receipt or invoice PDF — AI will pre-fill the form for you.

dropzone.hint: JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC/HEIF or PDF — up to 5 files
dropzone.primary: Drop photos or PDFs here or browse

errors.noDetails: We couldn't read any details from that. Try a clearer photo or a different document.
errors.photoTooLarge: One of the files is too large to scan. Try a smaller file.

providerDisabled.detail: AI vision isn't enabled on this server right now. Use Fill manually to continue.
providerDisabled.title: AI vision is unavailable

providerError.title: AI vision couldn't process those files

providerTimeout.title: AI vision took too long to respond

rateLimited.detail: Too many scan requests. Try again in a moment.
rateLimited.title: Hold on — too many scans

errors.tooManyPhotos: You can attach up to 5 files per scan.
errors.unsupportedMime: Only JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, HEIF photos and PDF documents can be scanned.

fullItem.description: Photograph the whole item clearly so AI can identify it
fullItem.title: Full item photo

label.description: Photograph the information label with model & serial numbers
label.title: Label / rating plate

review.currencyInferred: Currency wasn't on the server's supported list — it won't be pre-filled.
review.filesAttached_one: The file you scanned will be attached to this item — manage it on the Files step.
review.filesAttached_other: The {{count}} files you scanned will be attached to this item — manage them on the Files step.
review.subtitle: Untick anything that looks wrong before we prefill the form.
review.title: Review extracted details

warning.multipleItems: This looks like more than one item — we pre-filled the most prominent one. Add the others separately after saving.
warning.unreadableSerial: Serial number was hard to read

scanning.subtitle: AI is reading the label and identifying the item.
scanning.title: Scanning your files…

ai.title: Fill with AI

files.categoryAutoTitle: Category is set automatically from the file type and can be changed later from the file's detail page.
files.dropzone: Drop files here or click to browse
files.hint: We sort each file into Photos, Documents, or Other based on its type.
files.intro: Attach anything related to this item — photos, receipts, manuals. Files are optional and can be added later.
files.tagsPlaceholder: Enter comma-separated tags, e.g. invoice, warranty, manual…
files.title: Files

list.emptyDescription: Add your first inventory item to start tracking what you own.
list.emptyFilteredDescription: Try widening your search or clearing the filters.
list.errorDescription: Reload the page or try again in a moment.
list.heading: Items
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or short name…

trackingRestrictions.bannerBody: Bundle items don't support warranty, lending, or service tracking. Split into separate items if you need any of those per-unit.
trackingRestrictions.lendDisabled: Lending isn't tracked for items with quantity greater than 1. Split into separate items to lend individual units.
trackingRestrictions.serviceDisabled: Service tracking isn't available for items with quantity greater than 1. Split into separate items to send a single unit for repair.
trackingRestrictions.warrantyDisabled: Warranty isn't tracked for items with quantity greater than 1. Split into separate items if you need per-unit warranty tracking.
trackingRestrictions.warrantyStepHint: Warranty fields are disabled while quantity is greater than 1.

validation.commentsTooLong: Notes must be 1000 characters or fewer.
validation.convertedPriceRequired: Converted original price is required for non-draft items.
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 200 characters or fewer.
validation.noPriceInGroupCurrency: Enter at least one of converted price or current value so the item is reportable in group currency.
validation.originalPriceRequired: Original price is required for non-draft items.
validation.purchaseDateFuture: Purchase date cannot be in the future.
validation.purchaseDateRequired: Purchase date is required for non-draft items.
validation.quantityForbidsWarranty: Items with quantity greater than 1 don't support warranty tracking. Split into separate items for per-unit tracking.
validation.shortNameTooLong: Short name must be 40 characters or fewer.
